titleStmt.title: SII 22.239: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 239. (A.R. No. 239 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, CHEYYAR TALUK, TIRUPPANAṄGĀḌU. ŚIVA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. VIRŪPĀKSHA (II), SON OF HARIHARA (II)—Śaka 1313.

summary.p: The details of the date are given as Prajāpati, Siṁha, śu. 13, Sunday, Tiruvōṇam corresponding to A.D. 1391, August 13. This records the sale of the post of the temple and village accountant by the temple authorities to a certain Tiruvaṇṇāmalai-uḍaiyār Ishabhavāhana-dēvar for 350 paṇam. Mention is made of a severe draught in the previous year (Pramōdūta) as a result of which the temple got no yield on its lands and had to pay taxes to the king with this sale amount. The appointment is said to have carried with it, two free-hold houses situated to the west of Śaivaśēkharakālār's house, and certain other privileges.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran Arirāya vipāṭaṉ pāṣaikkut tappuvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ pūṟuva dakṣiṇa paccima samudrātipati śrīvira Ariyaṇa Uṭaiyar kumārar viruppaṇa Uṭaiyar pṛthivi rācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāni yirattu muṉṉūṟṟu Oru pattu muṉṟiṉmel cellāniṉṟa praśāpati samvaṟsarattu siṅṅanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu traiyodaśiyum
nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa tiruvoṇattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa maṇṭalattu kāliyūṟ koṭṭattu kaḻumalanāṭṭu brahmatecappaṟṟu Uṭaiyār Āḷuṭaiyār tiruppaṉaṅkāṭuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilil śrīmāheśvararum tānattārum Immaṇṭa ṉāṭṭu Ippaṟṟu nāṭṭuk kaikkoḷarum pākkam Uṭaiyāṉ Akampaṭiveḷār tiruvaṇṇāmalai Uṭaiyār Iṣapavākaṉa tevaṟku Aruḷic ceyal
paṭi Āticaṇṭecuravilai koyilkkaṇakku Ūrkkaṇakku kāṇivilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi muṉṉāḷ pramātota varuṣam maḻai Illāmal veṇ talaioṭu Uṟuṇṭa karippāy paṇattukkup patiṉāḻi nellu koḷḷakkiṭaiyāmal Ūru Oru varuṣam Āka kum Atikāri coṉṉapaṭi tervaippaṇam Uḷḷatu taraveṇum Eṉṟu Eṅkaḷai paṇittuvaikkaiyil kuṭukka mutal Illātapaṭi Āle Uṭaiyār
tiruppaṉaṅkāṭuṭaiya nāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇiāṉa koyiṟkaṇakkum Ūrkaṇakkukāṇi Āṉa tiruppaṉaṅkāṭu ciṟupaṉaṅkāṭu veḷḷaikuḷam Attippaṟṟu vaṉpākkam tiṟappu pāti Uṭppaṭa Āka Ivūrkaḷil nāṟpāṟkellaikku Uṭpaṭa pala tāṅkalum pala kuppamum Āka Ivūrkaḷil Ūrkkaṇakku kāṇik Āti caṇṭecuravilaiāka Emmil Icainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu kaṉmikkum vācipaṭāta naṟ � 3 100 5 10 Ippaṇam muṉṉūṟṟu Aimpatukkum Innāyaṉār koyil kaṇakku kāṇiyum
Ālāla cuntaraṉ tiruvitikku melai Orucciṟakaṉ tiruvitiyil caivacekara kālār maṉaikku melaimaṉai Iraṇṭum maṉaippaṭappaiyum tiruppaṉaṅkāṭu ciṟuppaṉaṅ kāṭu vaḷḷaikuḷam vaṉpākkam Āka Ivūrkaḷil pala kuppamum pala tāṅkalum Uṭppaṭa maṉaikkaṇakku kāṇiyum maṉaikaḷum maṉaippaṭappaiyum kaṇakkaṉ paṭṭikaḷum kaṇakkaṉ peṟum vai mutalum tevaiyum kaṇakku Ilakkaiyum Aruḷicceyalpaṭi Āticaṇṭecuravilai Āvutākavum Ituve vilai pramāṇam Āvutākavum Inta koyil kaṇakku
kāṇiyum Ūrkkaāṇiyum maṉaikaḷum kaṇakkuppaṭṭikaḷum cantiṟātitta varaiyum Ivarkku viṟṟu Oṟṟi pratikkrayatāya tāṉaṅ(ṅ)kaḷukkum Urittāvatākavum Ippaṇam 3 100 5 10 nāṅkaḷ paṟṟiṉatai � nāṉ Ivūrkaḷ cūlavarikku Oṟṟi vaittatu � 100 5 10 piṟamātota varuṣam cūlavarikku � 2 100 Ākap paṇam muṉṉūṟṟu Aimpatukku kāṇiyum caṇṭecuravilai Āka vilaippiṟamāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom veṇpākkamuṭaiyār Akampaṭi veḷār tiruvaṇṇāmalai Uṭaiyār
Iṣapavākaṉatevaṟkku Āḷuṭaiyār tiruppaṉaṅkāṭuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil śrī mākecurarum tāṉattārom Intak kāṇiāṭccikku Oru kalaṉum Illaik kalaṉuḷa vāyt toṟṟuppaṭil nāṅkaḷe tirttu kuṭukka kaṭavom Ivai Uṭaiyānāna śrīmāyecuranampi Eḻuttu Ivai Āṭiaruḷuvār tiruvetam paṭṭan Eḻuttu Ivai centāmaraikkaṇṇan tillaināyakaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.239 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
